# Sunburns and Spam Folders: Spring Break Deliverability Reset

Webinar

# Sunburns and Spam Folders: Spring Break Deliverability Reset

March 26, 2026

60 minutes

On demand

Join industry experts Jennifer Nespola Lantz, VP of Industry Relations and Deliverability at Kickbox, and Rob Schneider, Senior Email Deliverability Consultant at Iterable, as they share their best practices for a successful email strategy in 2026.

We’ll cover:

*   How AI is impacting email in 2026
*   How to build a foundation of good data and consent
*   Targeting and list maintenance tips to help you reach the inbox
